titleStmt.title: SII 37.388: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 388. (A.R. No. B 35 of 1941-42.) Pōrumāmiḷḷa, Badvel Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: On the door jamb at the entrance into the Lakshmīkāntasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1448, Vyaya, Jyēshṭha, śu. 13, corresponding to 1526 A.D., May 13, Thursday.

It records the grant of land made to Pōrumāmiḷḷa Aṇṇādvara-Nāyaka by Veṅgaḷayya, son of Rēvūri Kṛishṇamarāju, for the construction of a well and raising of a flower garden and an orchard near it. The gift was made at the instance of Aṇājayya, who held the pārapatyam of the Sakali-sīma included in the Ghaṇḍikōṭa śīma given as nāyaṅkara to Dēmarusayya by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
svasti śrī jayā
dbudaya śālivā
hana śakhavaru
ṣaṁbbulu 144
8 Agunēṁṭi vya
ya saṁvvatsara
jēṣṭa śu 13 lu [.]
śrīmanmahārā
jādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrī vī
rapratāpa śrī kṛ
ṣṇadēvamahārā
yalu pṛthvi rājya
ṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁ
gānu dēmarusa
yyaṁgārki nāya
kkarānu pāli
ccina ghaṁḍḍigō
ṭa śīmalōni cellēṭi
sakaliśīmaṁ Aṇā
jayyaṁgāru pāru
patyaṁ śēyaṁgānu
Aṁṇājayaṁgāri
Ānatini rēvūri kṛṣṇa
marāju koḍku veṁga
ḷla Aṁṇaudvaranāyi
nki yiccina dharmaśā
sanaṁ . dēvuni gu
ḍi vuttara teruvuna
nēmu krottagānu
bhāviṁnni tavviṁcci
yirusa velicēni
paṭṭuna pūvulatō
ṭanu phalavrikṣālu
nnu vēśēṭaṁduku dhā
ravōśi yistimi Ācchaṁ
drārkkaṁgānu Anu
bhaviṁccuvāru yī
puṇyānku yavvaru
tappinānu tama ce
lleliki tappinavāru .
rēvūri veṁgaḷayyavrālu .
nellūri
dvārabaṁ
daṁpāṭi
vīsamu
Digital edition of SII 37.388 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
